title: गृह प्रवेश मन्त्र
devanagariText:
॥ श्री गृह प्रवेश मन्त्र संग्रह ॥

॥ गणेश वन्दना ॥

ॐ गं गणपतये नमः।
वक्रतुण्ड महाकाय सूर्यकोटिसमप्रभ।
निर्विघ्नं कुरु मे देव सर्वकार्येषु सर्वदा॥

॥ वास्तु पुरुष मन्त्र ॥

ॐ वास्तोष्पते प्रति जानीह्यस्मान्
त्स्वावेशो अनमीवो भवा नः।
यत्त्वेमहे प्रति तन्नो जुषस्व
शं नो भव द्विपदे शं चतुष्पदे॥
(ऋग्वेद ७.५४.१)

हे वास्तुपुरुष! हमें पहचानो। तुम हमारे घर में निवास करो — रोगरहित और शान्तिमय। जो हम तुमसे मांगते हैं वह प्रदान करो। हमारे द्विपद (मनुष्य) और चतुष्पद (पशु) सबको मंगल हो।

॥ भूमि वन्दना मन्त्र ॥

ॐ भूमिर्धेनुर्धरणी लोकधारिणी।
उद्धृतासि वराहेण कृष्णेन शतबाहुना॥

ॐ पृथ्वी त्वया धृता लोका देवि त्वं विष्णुना धृता।
त्वं च धारय मां देवि पवित्रं कुरु चासनम्॥

॥ द्वार पूजा मन्त्र ॥

ॐ द्वारं हिरण्मयं शुभं सदा पातु श्रियं मम।
लक्ष्मीर्यस्य गृहे तिष्ठेत् यत्र द्वारं सुशोभितम्॥

ॐ शुभं करोति कल्याणम् आरोग्यं धनसम्पदम्।
शत्रुबुद्धिविनाशाय दीपज्योतिर्नमोऽस्तु ते॥

(द्वार पर मंगल दीप जलायें, स्वस्तिक बनायें, आम के पत्तों की बन्दनवार लगायें)

॥ गृह प्रवेश मुख्य मन्त्र ॥

ॐ शान्ताकारं भुजगशयनं पद्मनाभं सुरेशं
विश्वाधारं गगनसदृशं मेघवर्णं शुभाङ्गम्।
लक्ष्मीकान्तं कमलनयनं योगिभिर्ध्यानगम्यम्
वन्दे विष्णुं भवभयहरं सर्वलोकैकनाथम्॥

॥ लक्ष्मी आवाहन ॥

ॐ श्रीं ह्रीं क्लीं महालक्ष्म्यै नमः।

सर्वमंगलमाङ्गल्ये शिवे सर्वार्थसाधिके।
शरण्ये त्र्यम्बके गौरि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते॥

ॐ महालक्ष्मी च विद्महे विष्णुपत्न्यै च धीमहि।
तन्नो लक्ष्मीः प्रचोदयात्॥

(गृह में लक्ष्मी-गणेश की मूर्ति स्थापित करें, कलश स्थापना करें)

॥ नवग्रह शान्ति मन्त्र ॥

ॐ ब्रह्मा मुरारिस्त्रिपुरान्तकारी
भानुः शशी भूमिसुतो बुधश्च।
गुरुश्च शुक्रः शनिराहुकेतवः
सर्वे ग्रहाः शान्तिकराः भवन्तु॥

॥ अग्नि प्रज्वलन / हवन मन्त्र ॥

ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं
भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्॥

ॐ अग्नये स्वाहा। इदमग्नये इदं न मम।
ॐ सोमाय स्वाहा। इदं सोमाय इदं न मम।
ॐ प्रजापतये स्वाहा। इदं प्रजापतये इदं न मम।
ॐ इन्द्राय स्वाहा। इदमिन्द्राय इदं न मम।
ॐ वास्तोष्पतये स्वाहा। इदं वास्तोष्पतये इदं न मम।

(प्रत्येक आहुति गायत्री मन्त्र और सम्बन्धित देव मन्त्र के साथ)

॥ शान्ति मन्त्र ॥

ॐ द्यौः शान्तिरन्तरिक्षं शान्तिः
पृथिवी शान्तिरापः शान्तिरोषधयः शान्तिः।
वनस्पतयः शान्तिर्विश्वेदेवाः शान्तिर्ब्रह्म शान्तिः
सर्वं शान्तिः शान्तिरेव शान्तिः सा मा शान्तिरेधि॥
ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः॥

॥ गृह प्रवेश प्रार्थना ॥

ॐ सर्वे भवन्तु सुखिनः सर्वे सन्तु निरामयाः।
सर्वे भद्राणि पश्यन्तु मा कश्चिद् दुःखभाग्भवेत्॥

इस गृह में सदा सुख-शान्ति-समृद्धि रहे। गणेश-लक्ष्मी का वास हो। वास्तुदोष का निवारण हो। सर्व मंगल हो।

॥ इति श्री गृह प्रवेश मन्त्र संग्रह सम्पूर्ण ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Griha Pravesh Mantra Sangraha ||

|| Ganesha Vandana ||
Om Gam Ganapataye Namah.
Vakratunda Mahakaya Suryakoti-samaprabha.
Nirvighnam Kuru Me Deva Sarva-karyeshu Sarvada.

|| Vastu Purusha Mantra ||
Om Vastoshpate Prati Janihyasman
Tsvavesho Anamivo Bhava Nah.
Yattvemahe Prati Tanno Jushasva
Sham No Bhava Dvipade Sham Chatushpade.
(Rigveda 7.54.1)

|| Bhumi Vandana ||
Om Bhumir-dhenur-dharani Loka-dharini.
Uddhritasi Varahena Krishnena Shata-bahuna.

Om Prithvi Tvaya Dhrita Loka Devi Tvam Vishnuna Dhrita.
Tvam Cha Dharaya Mam Devi Pavitram Kuru Cha-asanam.

|| Dvara Puja Mantra ||
Om Dvaram Hiranyamayam Shubham Sada Patu Shriyam Mama.
Om Shubham Karoti Kalyanam Arogyam Dhana-sampadam.
Shatru-buddhi-vinashaya Dipa-jyotir-namostu Te.

|| Griha Pravesh Mukhya Mantra ||
Om Shantakaram Bhujagashayanam Padmanabham Suresham...
Vande Vishnum Bhava-bhaya-haram Sarva-lokaika-natham.

|| Lakshmi Avahana ||
Om Shrim Hrim Klim Mahalakshmyai Namah.
Om Mahalakshmi Cha Vidmahe Vishnu-patnyai Cha Dhimahi.
Tanno Lakshmih Prachodayat.

|| Navagraha Shanti ||
Om Brahma Muraris-tripurantakari...
Sarve Grahah Shantikarah Bhavantu.

|| Havan Mantra ||
Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah...
Om Agnaye Svaha. Om Somaya Svaha.
Om Prajapataye Svaha. Om Indraya Svaha.
Om Vastoshpataye Svaha.

|| Shanti Mantra ||
Om Dyauh Shantir-antarikksham Shantih...
Om Shantih Shantih Shantih.

|| Griha Pravesh Prarthana ||
Om Sarve Bhavantu Sukhinah Sarve Santu Niramayah.
Sarve Bhadrani Pashyantu Ma Kashchid Duhkha-bhag-bhavet.

|| Iti Shri Griha Pravesh Mantra Sangraha Sampurna ||
hindiMeaning: गृह प्रवेश मन्त्र संग्रह — गणेश वन्दना से विघ्न निवारण, वास्तु पुरुष मन्त्र (ऋग्वेद) से वास्तु शान्ति, भूमि वन्दना से पृथ्वी माता का आशीर्वाद, द्वार पूजा मन्त्र से गृह में लक्ष्मी का प्रवेश। विष्णु स्तुति, लक्ष्मी-गायत्री से समृद्धि का आवाहन। नवग्रह शान्ति मन्त्र से ग्रहदोष निवारण। गायत्री मन्त्र सहित हवन आहुतियाँ — अग्नि, सोम, प्रजापति, इन्द्र, वास्तुपुरुष को। शान्ति पाठ — द्युलोक, अन्तरिक्ष, पृथ्वी, जल, औषधि, वनस्पति, विश्वदेव, ब्रह्म — सबमें शान्ति हो। अन्त में प्रार्थना — सब सुखी हों, निरोगी हों, कल्याण देखें।
benefits: Complete mantra collection for Griha Pravesh (housewarming) ceremony
Includes authentic Vedic Vastu Purusha mantra from Rig Veda 7.54.1
Traditionally recited for removal of vastu dosha and invites positive energies into the new home
Invokes Ganesha for obstacle removal and Lakshmi for prosperity
Contains havan mantras for the sacred fire ceremony during griha pravesh
Shanti path ensures peace in all directions and dimensions of the new home
description: Griha Pravesh Mantras (गृह प्रवेश मन्त्र) is a sacred prayer dedicated to Lord Ganesha. Rooted in Rig Veda, Grihya Sutras, Vastu Shastra, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Devotees recite this prayer to include authentic Vedic Vastu Purusha mantra from Rig Veda 7.54.1 and shanti path ensures peace in all directions and dimensions of the new home. It is also said to contain havan mantras for the sacred fire ceremony during griha pravesh. The text contains 15 verses and takes around 12 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Griha Pravesh Mantras in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Griha Pravesh Mantras in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Complete housewarming ceremony mantras with Vastu Purusha Sukta.
source: Rig Veda, Grihya Sutras, Vastu Shastra

Vastu shanti homa havan procedure new house

Boiling milk ritual at new home dudh ubalna

seoFaqs.question: What is Griha Pravesh and which mantras are recited during the ceremony?
seoFaqs.answer: Griha Pravesh literally means entering the house and refers to the Hindu ceremony performed when a family enters a newly built or newly purchased home for the first time. The traditional mantra sequence includes the Ganesha Vandana (Vakratunda Mahakaya) for obstacle removal, the Vastu Purusha Mantra from Rigveda 7.54.1 (Om Vastoshpate prati janihyasman), the Bhumi Vandana to Mother Earth, the Dwara Puja mantras at the threshold, the central Vishnu invocation (Shantakaram Bhujagashayanam), the Lakshmi Avahana with the Mahalakshmi Gayatri, the Navagraha Shanti mantra, Vedic havan ahutis, and the concluding Shanti Path. (Sources: Grihya Sutras; Vastu Shastra texts; Drikpanchang Griha Pravesh.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the Vastu Purusha mantra from Rigveda 7.54.1 and why is it central to Griha Pravesh?
seoFaqs.answer: The Vastu Purusha Mantra Om Vastoshpate prati janihyasman, tvavesho anamivo bhava nah, yat tvemahe pratitanno jushasva, sham no bhava dvipade sham chatushpade is from Rigveda Mandala 7, Sukta 54, Verse 1, attributed to Rishi Vasishtha. It addresses Vastoshpati, the Lord of the Dwelling, asking him to recognise the new residents, take auspicious abode in the home free from disease, accept the prayers of the householders, and bestow welfare on both bipeds (humans) and quadrupeds (cattle). It is considered the foundational Vedic mantra for any vastu-shanti ritual and is the only Rig Vedic griha-mantra still in continuous use. (Sources: Rigveda 7.54.1; Sayanacharya Bhashya; Vastu Shastra.)

seoFaqs.question: What are the three types of Griha Pravesh according to tradition?
seoFaqs.answer: The Vastu and Grihya texts describe three principal types of Griha Pravesh based on the situation. Apoorva Griha Pravesh is the entry into a brand-new, never-before-occupied house and requires the most elaborate ceremony with full Vastu Homa, Navagraha Shanti and Kalasha Sthapana. Sapoorva Griha Pravesh is the re-entry into an existing house after a long absence (typically due to travel, work transfer or pilgrimage) and uses a simpler shanti puja. Dwandvah or Dwarodghatan Griha Pravesh is the entry into a house after major renovation, repair or after a calamity such as fire or flood, and includes specific dosha-nivarana (defect-removing) mantras. (Sources: Vastu Shastra; Drikpanchang Griha Pravesh types.)

seoFaqs.question: What is the auspicious muhurat for Griha Pravesh?
seoFaqs.answer: Traditional Hindu astrology recommends Griha Pravesh in specific months and lunar days. Auspicious months include Magha (January-February), Phalguna (February-March), Vaishakha (April-May) and Jyeshtha (May-June). Months to avoid are Ashadha, Shravana, Bhadrapada, Ashvina (Shraddha Paksha and Adhik Maas), Pausha and Margashirsha. Auspicious days are Monday, Wednesday, Thursday and Friday; Tuesday, Saturday and Sunday are generally avoided. Auspicious tithis are Dwitiya, Tritiya, Panchami, Saptami, Dashami, Ekadashi and Trayodashi. The Rohini, Mrigashira, Anuradha, Chitra, Revati, Dhanishtha and Uttara nakshatras are particularly favoured. (Sources: Drikpanchang Griha Pravesh muhurat; Muhurta Chintamani.)

seoFaqs.question: What rituals are performed alongside the mantras during Griha Pravesh?
seoFaqs.answer: The standard ritual sequence accompanying the mantras includes mango leaf toran (festoon) and rangoli at the doorway, the husband and wife entering together with the wife's right foot first carrying a kalasha (water-pot) topped with coconut and mango leaves, breaking a coconut at the threshold, milk boiling (dudh ubalna) on the kitchen stove until it overflows symbolising abundance, installation of the home shrine with Ganesha and Lakshmi murtis, performance of a small Vastu Homa with offerings to Agni, Soma, Prajapati, Indra and Vastoshpati, feeding Brahmins or guests, and distribution of prasada. The mantra collection in this stotra accompanies each step. (Sources: Grihya Sutras; regional Pandit manuals; Drikpanchang procedure.)

seoFaqs.question: Can Griha Pravesh be performed in a rented house or only in an owned home?
seoFaqs.answer: The traditional Apoorva Griha Pravesh in its full form is prescribed for a newly constructed house owned by the family, since the Vastu Shanti is for the dwelling itself. However, contemporary practice permits a simplified Sapoorva-style Griha Pravesh — including the Vastu Purusha mantra, Ganesha vandana, Lakshmi avahana and Shanti Path — when entering a rented or leased house, a flat in an apartment building, or a temporary residence. The full Vastu Homa is generally performed only once for a newly built owned home, while the simpler mantra-recitation form is appropriate for any new dwelling to invoke peace, prosperity and divine protection. (Sources: contemporary Pandit guidance; Acharya Vidyasagar manuals.)
